query:
SELECT email, status, unsubscribedAt FROM subscribers WHERE email IN (
  'ndreaorioli@foolfarm.com',
  'azionistifoolfarm@foolfarm.com',
  'cda@foolfarm.com',
  'foolers@foolfarm.com',
  'foolfarmteam@foolfarm.com',
  'hr@foolfarm.com',
  'andrea.cinelli@inventia.biz',
  'help@free-now.com',
  'info@swappie.com',
  'support@satispay.com',
  'mteoleonard@gmail.com',
  'jannottig@gmail.com',
  'edita.g@fluentis.com'
) ORDER BY email;
